series_metadata.series_description: Forms used to reimburse vendors and state agencies for goods and or services received. Includes any backup documents such as payment card log delivery and packing slips, invoices, bills of lading, bond registers, bonds & coupons redeemed, receiving reports and OAKS coding attachments.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office provided audit performed by Auditor of State and audit report released and all discrepancies resolved ; Electronic: in office provided audit performed by Auditor of State and audit report released and all discrepancies resolved
